channel.title: CI/CD on Vijay Raja
channel.description: Recent content in CI/CD on Vijay Raja

item.title: Exploring the Next Frontier : Beyond CI/CD
item.description: Good marning everyone, I am vijay raja. open source developer and full Stack developer. I thank bangalore jug for giving me this wonderful opportunity to Share my practical experience with you all. whatever that i’m going to talk today is based on my Experience in bbuilding an open source platform call gurukulams.com. Gurukulam.com is an online education Platform it’s build by the students for the students. being an opensource project. 80% of contribution are come from either people with lessor experience or no experience, in fact majority of out contributor are either teacher or students.
